tasks.title: Migrate in-repo broker examples to navigator_eventbus.brokers
tasks.parallelism_notes: Sequential: all FEAT-318 tasks operate on the same navigator repo in a strict order (examples -> deps -> delete -> coordinate). Hard-blocked externally on FEAT-316 (navigator-eventbus[brokers] must be installable). Executes in ../navigator, not ai-parrot.

tasks.title: Update navigator pyproject — add [brokers] extra, drop aiormq
tasks.parallelism_notes: Must follow TASK-1835 so no live importer of navigator.brokers remains when aiormq is dropped. Keep aioboto3/redis (used outside brokers/). Executes in ../navigator.

tasks.title: Delete navigator/brokers/ origin tree + import-neutrality guard
tasks.parallelism_notes: Destructive step; runs only after examples migrated and deps pruned so the neutrality guard passes. Single clean git rm for bisectability. No shim. Executes in ../navigator.

tasks.title: Verify public surface, close PR #393, document breaking change & release coordination
tasks.parallelism_notes: Closing task: changelog note + PR #393 closure + external-consumer (Flowtask/FieldSync) release coordination. Depends on the deletion being done. Executes in ../navigator + GitHub.
